name: Hunan Hot & Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breasts, skinned, boned, and cut into bite-size pieces
1 tablespoon fermented black beans, rinsed and drained
1 small green pepper, seeded and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine cornstarch, dry sherry, salt, and black pepper. Add chicken and stir to coat. Stir in 1 1/2 tablespoons of salad oil. Let stand for 15 minutes to marinate.
2. Prepare the cooking sauce by blending all ingredients in another bowl. Set aside.
3. Place a wok or wide frying pan over high heat. When the pan is hot, add 2 tablespoons of salad oil.
4. When the oil begins to heat, add garlic, ginger, and black beans. Stir once.
5. Add chicken and stir-fry until opaque (about 3 minutes). Remove chicken from the pan.
6. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of salad oil to the pan. When the oil is hot, add green pepper, carrot, and bamboo shoots. Stir for 30 seconds.
7. Add water and stir-fry for 1 1/2 minutes.
8. Return chicken to the pan. Stir in the cooking sauce, then add it to the pan. Cook, stirring until the sauce bubbles and thickens.
9. If you like food that produces watery eyes and a burning mouth, pass a little bowl of hot pepper & black bean sauce (recipe follows).
